plant.title: Lipstick Plant
plant.summary: Lipstick Plants produce bright red, tubular flowers that emerge from dark calyces, resembling lipstick. They are non-toxic to pets and thrive with moderate humidity and indirect light.
plant.contentHtml: Aeschynanthus radicans is a trailing epiphyte native to Southeast Asia. It’s a popular hanging basket plant due to its arching stems and vibrant blooms. The plant prefers consistently moist soil and benefits from regular misting. With proper care, it can flower profusely throughout the growing season, adding a splash of color to any room.
